emails.subject: RE: Update on Confirm Logic
emails.body: I have set aside my afternoon today to complete the timeline resource needs, rewrite the presentation to originators, recap today's Monday morning meeting on commercialization efforts this week, work on my game plan for EES and to get with Bob Hall to create our update for Brian Redmond's Tuesday meeting with Louise regarding HPL. I will share these with you as I check off the list this afternoon. --Sally

emails.subject: RE: Update on Confirm Logic
emails.body: I will have that to you by the end of the afternoon. I have set aside my afternoon to complete the timeline and resource needs, rewrite the presentation to originators, recap our Monday morning meeting on commercialization efforts for this week, work on my game plan for EES and get with Bob Hall to do an update for Brian Redmond on the HPL sale before his Tueday meeting with Louise. I will share these items with you as I get them checked off my list this afternoon. --Sally

emails.subject: RE: Update on Confirm Logic
emails.body: I think I am seeing you tomorrow at 8 AM. I understand you are out Wednesday through Friday. Sounds like the operations role is fairly substantial all on its own with EES, EA, HPL, etc. as well as EGM and EIM with their ramp ups related to ships, rail cars and trucks. See you in the morning. I have an 8:30 AM so I only have that 30 minutes. Thanks. GP
